comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (rather freely) + Refrain (brighter but warmly). Pipeline has significant gaps in the refrain where notes were lost (m17-m19: 'A fog-gy day in Lon-don', m33-m35: 'charm How long I won-dered could this thing'). Verse OCR has garbled tokens and stage-direction-as-lyrics.

1.comment: OCR merged 'a strang' into 'ast rang'. Published: 'I was a strang-er in the'.

3.comment: Pipeline read '(rather freely)' direction as lyric 'freely'. Published: 'Out of town were the'.

6.comment: Pipeline dropped 'self' from 'self-pi-ty'. Published: 'self - pi-ty, What to'.

7.comment: Pipeline had 'do What to do to' (5 on 6n). Published: 'do? What to do? What to'.

8.comment: Pipeline had 'do? The II' -- 'II' is OCR garbage. Published: 'do? The'.

11.comment: Pipeline dropped 'walked'. Published: 'walked through the fog-gy'.

12.comment: Pipeline dropped 'a' from 'a-lone'. Published: 'streets a-lone, It'.

24.comment: Pipeline had 'had me down. ing' -- 'ing' is OCR bleed from next system. Published: 'had me down.'.

26.comment: Pipeline read 'vie' instead of 'viewed'. Published: 'I viewed the'.

28.comment: Pipeline had 'a,' with misplaced comma. Published: 'with a larm,'.

38.comment: Pipeline had OCR garble 'age of " \' mir'. Published: 'age of mir'.

39.comment: Pipeline had 'a,' with stray comma. Published: 'a-cles' (end of mir-a-cles).

40.comment: Pipeline had 'had won dered' -- misaligned lyrics from different phrase. Published: 'had n't passed,'.
